title: Sysmon DNS Tunneling via Network Connection
description: Detects suspicious processes making DNS connections (port 53) that could indicate DNS tunneling for data exfiltration or C2 communication.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Destination Port' = 53 and Initiated = 'true') and (('Process Name' like '*\powershell.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\cmd.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\nslookup.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\iodine.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\dnscat2.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\dns2tcp.exe')) and not (('Process Name' like '*\svchost.exe' or 'Process Name' like '*\dns.exe')))
